历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1372 → 1606 → 1851 → 1941 → 2472, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1100 places in the last 4 years. In 2025, it shifted significantly backward by 531 places compared to 2024, indicating an accelerating trend. The enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 51 → 53 → 55 → 55 → 55 students, and the 2026 plan remains at 55 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 20th in 2021–2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, 21st in 2026, consistently in the national Top 21, very high level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication by the dean of the School of Life Sciences and multiple teachers being reported by name, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), but popular videos mostly involve negative public opinion. In 2022, there was a cutoff line break in Henan. Disciplines: Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Political Science A, Marxist Theory A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 14 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Nankai University's enrollment majors like Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology). The number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, and the total number of examinees in 2026 is 209,000 (estimated at about 140,000 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 67%), with the examinee scale continuously expanding and competition intensifying. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in this province, with no regional preference advantage in Chongqing. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was stable at 51–55 students, a very small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings (about 1100 places backward in the last 4 years, with an accelerated backward shift of 531 places in 2025), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous growth of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing (intensified competition), and the negative reputation events in 2026 (academic misconduct) which may further push the ranking backward, but the top-tier level of 985/Soft Science Top 21 and 14 A- or above advantageous disciplines provide strong support. It is expected that the ranking will continue to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 2472; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2522, with a range of 2219–2825.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2219), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2825), prioritize safety options in Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated around 405→432→516→370→416, with significant volatility. In 2024, it notably advanced to 370th place, then moved back to 416th in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 46–146 places in the last two years. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 15→15→18→18→19, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 15 students, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 21%), which weakens competition and favors a forward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked among the top 21 nationally in the Soft Science main ranking, indicating a very high level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' involving academic misconduct incidents, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), but History Category candidates may be less sensitive to reputation than Science Category candidates. Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Marxist Theory A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, with outstanding strength in History-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature continue to be popular and recommended, highly aligned with Nankai University's enrollment majors like Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, and Public Administration. The number of History Category candidates in Chongqing decreased from 82,738 in 2021 to 73,373 in 2025, with a total of 209,000 candidates in 2026 (estimated about 69,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 33%), showing a slight decline in candidate scale. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Chongqing, so it has no regional preference advantage. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 15–19 students, a very small proportion, limiting the impact of regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations (2025 baseline about 416th), the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 21% (weakening competition, favoring a forward shift in ranking), a slight decline in the number of History Category candidates, limited impact of negative reputation events, and strong support from the school's top tier and advantageous disciplines, the ranking is expected to advance slightly from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 373rd, with a range of 328–418.
